creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 211897
zkt 1.1.4

And another 2 years passed.

PORTREVISIONS switched RUN_DEPENDS from bind99 to bind-tools, but didn't upgrade.
Enclosed patch does.

Succesfully tested using poudriere and portlint.

I doubt if anyone uses this tool, but at least then this PR can be closed.
Hope the MAINTAINER will read this...
